description_long: This is a rectangular office desk with a smooth, flat top surface and a set of three drawers on the right side. The desk is constructed from a wood-like material with a light brown finish, giving it a modern and professional appearance. The drawers are vertically aligned and feature subtle, handle-less fronts, contributing to a minimalist design. The left side of the desk is open, providing ample legroom for a seated user, while the right side and back are fully enclosed. The overall structure is sturdy, with clean lines and a solid build suitable for workspaces, offices, or study areas. The desk's design is practical for urban environments, offering both workspace and storage.
description: A modern, light brown office desk with three handle-less drawers on the right and an open leg space on the left. The design is minimalist and functional, ideal for workspaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat desktop, three drawers on the right, and open leg space on the left.
description_view_1: Right side view displaying the solid side panel and the depth of the desk, with drawer fronts partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a fully enclosed back panel with no visible drawers or openings.
description_view_3: Left side view with a solid panel and no drawers, highlighting the open leg space on the opposite side.
